briefdescription.para: Zero-Dependency 3D/2D Vector and Matrix Math structures.

detaileddescription.para: Implements lightweight vector (GazeVector2, GazeVector3), basis (GazeBasis3D), and transform (GazeTransform3D) structs. Includes utilities for Euler angle decompositions, Rodrigues rotation conversions, and gaze-space forward vector computations.
